about: Fullstack JavaScript Developer with 6 years of experience developing and maintaining web applications. Experienced in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, databases, cloud infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, and microservices. Capable of working independently or in teams and delivering projects end-to-end.

responsibilities: Collaborate with cross-functional teams in innovation lab
Worked with multiple clients on software and app development
Client acquisition via Upwork and other platforms
Led project delivery until company closure
Agile development of applications and services
Promoted from Software Engineer I to II
Managed a remote team of 2 developers

certifications_and_awards.title: Microservices with Node JS and React

projects.title: Red Sea Digital (CMS)
projects.description:
Created innovative CMS for Red Sea Digital (RSD), simplifying content management across multiple screens.
Led development of RSD CMS, enhancing audience engagement and digital management capabilities.
Delivered user-friendly interface for dynamic content scheduling and targeted messaging.
projects.technologies: Nodejs, Reactjs, HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript, MongoDB, Firebase, Docker etc.

projects.title: CarHub
projects.description:
Created CarHub, a digitalized automotive service solution for convenient and quality car servicing.
Integrated various service providers on a single platform, offering location, services, and pricing information.
Streamlined the process of selecting service providers, enhancing the car service experience for users.
projects.technologies: Nodejs, Reactjs, HTML, CSS, Javascript, Typescript, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Firebase, Docker etc.

projects.title: Real Research & RR Store
projects.description:
Architected and implemented the Real Research backend utilizing MongoDB, Node.js, Express.js, and other cutting-edge JavaScript technologies,
including Mongoose ORM, Redis for caching, RabbitMQ for messaging, and Socket.io for real-time communication.
Leveraged the power of asynchronous programming and event-driven architecture with technologies such as async/await, Promises, and event
emitters, enhancing scalability and responsiveness.
Integrated robust authentication and authorization mechanisms using technologies like Passport.js and JSON Web Tokens (JWT) to ensure secure
access to Real Research services.
projects.technologies: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Socket.io, Passport.js, JWT

projects.title: Stream-Coin
projects.description:
Developed the StreamCoin blockchain app as a backend developer, leveraging technologies such as Ethereum, and web3.js for blockchain
integration.
Implemented smart contracts to enable secure and direct transactions between users and streamers, eliminating the need for intermediaries.
Utilized Node.js, Express.js, and JavaScript to build the backend infrastructure, incorporating real-time communication and database technologies
like WebSockets and MongoDB for seamless functionality and efficient data management.
projects.technologies: Ethereum, web3.js, Solidity, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, WebSockets

projects.technologies: Ethereum blockchain, Solidity smart contract language, web3.js library, Node.js, Express.js, JavaScript, WebSockets, MongoDB
